svg.text: Both paths converge → α AND κ_gate
(R, S_sup, N, α, ω, κ_gate, σ, c)
κ_int, σ from φ-morphism feed κ_gate
each role reads same cert independently
EXECUTE only if all gates pass
each gate failure triggers exactly one morph operator (one scalar, one direction → termination guaranteed)
each moves one scalar, one direction
non-execute → morph → re-derive cert (κ_int, σ) → re-evaluate gates
330 output → new EventNode carrying newly-derived cert → 304
actual intermediate state, not initialization state
Loop 2 = 328: Agent Handoff (execute path, passes through 330)
Fixed embeddings; deterministic φ; no gradient descent / RL / RLHF at runtime — all adaptation via morph operators only
